title: review_text and advisory_review duplicate single-pass adversary flow violating DRY
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
dry
## Location
src/vdd/mod.rs:209-281 (review_text) vs 348-398 (advisory_review)
## Violation
Both methods implement the same six-step pipeline: short-circuit on disabled/short input, run static analysis, build adversary request, send, parse findings, triage, format injection. The only difference is review_text accepts user_task: &str directly while advisory_review extracts it via extract_user_task.

Both contain the same six lines:
```rust
let static_results = self.run_static_analysis().await;
let adversary_request = self.build_adversary_request(builder_text, user_task, &static_results, 1);
let (adversary_text, tokens_used) = self.send_to_adversary(&adversary_request).await?;
let mut findings = self.parse_findings(&adversary_text, 1);
self.triage_findings(&mut findings, &[], builder_text, builder_provider, builder_api_key).await;
let context_injection = format_findings_for_injection(&findings, &static_results);
```

Drift between them creates two divergent VDD behaviors.

## Mandated refactor
Extract the shared pipeline into one private method taking the resolved user_task. Both become thin adapters.

## Filed from QA review dispatch
